# AI Unfiltered - Full Article List

> This file contains recent AI news articles for consumption by LLMs and AI agents.
> Updated every 4 hours. Links to original sources.

- Source: Latent Space
- Category: open-source
- URL: https://www.latent.space/p/ainews-open-models-model-labs-vs
- Summary: a quiet day lets us reflect on a great essay

### Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.8

- Category: incidents
- URL: https://status.claude.com/incidents/1gjynxqv85rk
